name: High-purity spermidine older-men safety trial
summary: An exploratory double-blind randomized trial testing 7-day and 28-day dosing of high-purity spermidine in older men.

trial_details.horizon_note: Results are already in the public evidence layer, so this is not an open no-result watch item.
trial_details.why_it_matters: Results matter for Autophagy Induction because they can show whether the intervention changes safety and biomarkers in Healthy men aged 50 to 70 years. That is still narrower than proof of broad aging reversal.
